import socket

    s = socket.socket\(socket.AF_INET, socket.SOCK_STREAM\)
    s.setsockopt\(socket.SOL_SOCKET, socket.SO_REUSEADDR, 1\)

    print\('Port 8000 CAN be bound'\)
    s.close\(\)

")

Bash(/c/Users/Dell/Desktop/MY_PRODUCTS/ADP/venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "
import urllib.request, json, time

base = 'http://localhost:8000/api/v1'

phone = '080' + str\(int\(time.time\(\)\)\)[-8:]

def req\(method, path, data=None, headers={}\):
    body = json.dumps\(data\).encode\(\) if data else None
    h = {'Content-Type': 'application/json', **headers}
    r = urllib.request.Request\(base + path, data=body, headers=h, method=method\)
    try:
        resp = urllib.request.urlopen\(r, timeout=10\)
        return resp.status, resp.read\(\)
    except urllib.error.HTTPError as e:
        return e.code, e.read\(\)

s, r = req\('POST', '/auth/verify-otp', {'phone_number': phone, 'otp': '123456'}\)
token = json.loads\(r\)['access_token']
intl = '+234' + phone[1:]

s, raw = req\('POST', '/user/profile',
    {'phone_number': intl, 'full_name': 'Debug', 'password': 'pass'},
    {'Authorization': f'Bearer {token}'}
\)
print\('Status:', s\)
print\('Raw bytes \(repr\):', repr\(raw[:500]\)\)
print\('Length:', len\(raw\)\)
")

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -State Listen | Select-Object -Property LocalAddress,LocalPort,OwningProcess | ForEach-Object { \\$proc = Get-Process -Id \\$_.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; [PSCustomObject]@{Port=\\$_.LocalPort; PID=\\$_.OwningProcess; Name=\\$proc.Name; Path=\\$proc.Path} }" 2>/dev/null)

Bash(powershell -Command "
\\$listeners = Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object LocalPort -in @\(8000,8001\)
foreach \(\\$l in \\$listeners\) {
    \\$proc = Get-Process -Id \\$l.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
    Write-Host 'Port' \\$l.LocalPort 'PID' \\$l.OwningProcess 'Process:' \\$proc.ProcessName \\$proc.Path
}
" 2>/dev/null)

Bash(powershell -Command "
\\$proc = Get-WmiObject Win32_Process -Filter 'ProcessId = 17860'
Write-Host 'Name:' \\$proc.Name
Write-Host 'Cmdline:' \\$proc.CommandLine
Write-Host 'Owner:' \(\\$proc.GetOwner\(\) | ConvertTo-Json -Compress\)
" 2>/dev/null)
